landmarks.name: Sheraton Suites Chicago O'Hare (JS Tek HQ)

quiz.question: JS Tek 2026 is hosted at which Rosemont hotel?

landmarks.name: Fashion Outlets of Chicago
landmarks.description: A nearby indoor outlet mall that gives the demo a recognizable Rosemont checkpoint close to the conference area.

landmarks.description: Rosemont's dining and entertainment district, useful as the 'after the conference' quest stop.

landmarks.name: Rosemont Theatre
landmarks.description: A major live-event venue near the outlet mall and entertainment district, perfect for a show-themed badge.

landmarks.name: Donald E. Stephens Convention Center
landmarks.description: Rosemont's large convention and trade-show venue, a natural dev-conference-adjacent landmark.

landmarks.name: Rosemont CTA Blue Line Station
landmarks.description: A useful transit checkpoint for attendees heading between Rosemont, O'Hare, and Chicago.

landmarks.name: Allstate Arena
landmarks.description: A nearby Rosemont arena for sports, concerts, and big live events. This makes a fun high-energy challenge stop.
